creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
When initializing postgesql15-server on 14.0-RC2, it fails.  It says:

performing post-bootstrap initialization ... 2023-10-25 16:02:36.789 EDT [62597] FATAL:  could not load locale "sr_YU.ISO8859-5"
2023-10-25 16:02:36.789 EDT [62597] STATEMENT:  SELECT pg_import_system_collations('pg_catalog');

... now poudriere compiled the port just fine --- but that doesn't create a database and thus doesn't init the database.

With some googling, I've come up with this url.  Not very satisfactory, but at least someone else is thinking about it.

https://kiwi.tourmentine.com/public/postgresql_upgrade_on_freebsd

I am not sure if this is 14.0-RC2 related or more general just psql-15 related.
